issue.title: Replace MemoryStore with PostgreSQL storage
issue.body: Persist issue workflow state after backend restart.
issue.author: amir

yaml_config:
version: 1
repository:
  default_branch: main
  target_branch_prefix: ai/
analysis:
  enabled: true
  include:
    - src/**
code_generation:
  enabled: true
  require_user_approval: true
  reviewer_policy: issue_author
  allowed_actions:
    approve_command: "/approve"
    correct_command: "/correct"
    reject_command: "/reject"
recommendations:
  retention_days: 30
